# Trigonometry — Standalone Curriculum Spec

## 1. Overview

**Purpose:** A self-contained, standalone Trigonometry course with structured lessons, tiered practice (easy/medium/hard), and unit quizzes.  
**Entry point:** `trigonometry.html` (generated by `build-trigonometry.js` from source HTML).  
**Data source:** Inline `TRIGONOMETRY_CURRICULUM` array in `trigonometry.html`, built from `/Users/robn/Downloads/trigonometry-curriculum.html` with injected `deeperLinks`.  
**Relation to other offerings:**

| Offering | Type | Entry Point |
|---|---|---|
| Essential Math Primer | Sequential K–12 lessons (15 min each) | `primer.html` |
| MAP Test Prep | Endless MAP-style MCQ practice | `map-prep.html` |
| Algebra I Curriculum | Full course: 11 units | `algebra-i.html` |
| Algebra II Curriculum | Full course: 12 units | `algebra-ii.html` |
| Geometry Curriculum | Full course: 13 units | `geometry.html` |
| **Trigonometry Curriculum** | Full course: 12 units, lessons + practice + quiz | `trigonometry.html` |
| Topic Library | Individual topic walkthroughs/practice | `math/<topic>/` |

---

## 2. Data Model

### 2.1 Unit object

Each item in `TRIGONOMETRY_CURRICULUM` has:

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `id` | number | Unit number 1–12 |
| `title` | string | Unit title |
| `obj` | string | Learning objectives summary |
| `deeperLinks` | array | `{ label, url }` — injected by build; cross-links to `math/<topic>/walkthrough.html` |
| `prs` | array | `{ id, text }` — prerequisite background notes |
| `ls` | array | Lessons; see §2.2 |
| `pr` | array | Practice questions; see §2.3 |
| `qz` | array | Quiz questions; see §2.4 |

### 2.2 Lesson object (`ls[]`)

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `t` | string | Lesson title |
| `c` | string | Lesson content (HTML) |
| `f` | string[] | Formula strings (monospace) |
| `ex` | object | Optional `{ p: string, s: string[] }` — worked example problem and steps |

### 2.3 Practice question object (`pr[]`)

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `d` | string | `'easy'` \| `'medium'` \| `'hard'` |
| `q` | string | Question text |
| `o` | string[] | Answer options |
| `c` | number | Index of correct option |
| `x` | string | Explanation (shown after answering) |

### 2.4 Quiz question object (`qz[]`)

Same shape as practice minus `d`; explanation shown only after quiz submission.

---

## 3. Units

| # | Unit Title | Lessons | Practice Qs | Quiz Qs |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Right Triangle Trigonometry | 3 | 9 | 5 |
| 2 | The Unit Circle | 3 | 9 | 5 |
| 3 | Graphing Trigonometric Functions | 2 | 9 | 5 |
| 4 | Trigonometric Identities | 2 | 9 | 5 |
| 5 | Sum, Difference & Double-Angle Formulas | 2 | 8 | 5 |
| 6 | Inverse Trigonometric Functions | 2 | 6 | 5 |
| 7 | Solving Trigonometric Equations | 2 | 7 | 5 |
| 8 | Law of Sines & Law of Cosines | 2 | 8 | 5 |
| 9 | Polar Coordinates & Complex Numbers | 2 | 6 | 5 |
| 10 | Vectors | 2 | 7 | 5 |
| 11 | Parametric Equations & Polar Graphs | 2 | 6 | 5 |
| 12 | Applications & Modeling | 2 | 7 | 5 |
| **Total** | | **26** | **91** | **60** |

*(Build script and hero display these totals.)*

---

## 4. App State

### 4.1 In-memory

- `STATE.currentUnit` — index (0–11).
- `STATE.currentTab` — `'lesson'` \| `'practice'` \| `'quiz'`.
- `STATE.answers` — keys `"<unitIndex>-p-<qi>"` (practice), `"<unitIndex>-q-<qi>"` (quiz).
- `STATE.quizSubmitted` — `{ "<unitIndex>-qz": true }`.
- `STATE.completedUnits` — `Set<number>` of unit indices that passed the quiz.

### 4.2 Persisted

**`localStorage` key:** `trigonometry-progress`  
**Shape:** `{ answers, quizSubmitted, completedUnits }`. Loaded on init, saved after every answer and quiz submission.

---

## 5. Grading & Quiz

- Practice: immediate feedback and explanation after each answer.
- Quiz: answers locked until Submit; score ≥ 60% → unit added to `STATE.completedUnits` (nav shows ✓). Retake clears quiz answers and completion for current unit.

---

## 6. Build

- **Script:** `build-trigonometry.js`
- **Source:** `TRIGONOMETRY_SOURCE` env or default `/Users/robn/Downloads/trigonometry-curriculum.html`
- **Output:** `trigonometry.html`
- **Steps:** Read source → extract `const U=[...];` → inject `deeperLinks` at each unit end (regex for `]\n},\n// ══════════════` and last unit `]\n}\n];`) → wrap with site header/footer, styles, and app script.

---

## 7. Integration Points

- `primer.html`: "Also Try" includes Trigonometry card → `trigonometry.html`.
- `index.html` header tagline: includes `<a href="trigonometry.html">∿ Trigonometry</a>`.
- Theme: copper/amber (`#d97706`, `#b45309`). Respects `mathbored-theme` from localStorage.

---

## 8. Relation to Other Curricula

| Aspect | Algebra I | Algebra II | Geometry | Trigonometry |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Entry point | algebra-i.html | algebra-ii.html | geometry.html | trigonometry.html |
| localStorage key | algebraI-progress | algebraII-progress | geometry-progress | trigonometry-progress |
| Units | 11 | 12 | 13 | 12 |
| Accent | blue | purple | teal | copper/amber |
| Quiz key suffix | -quiz | -qz | -qz | -qz |

All four are standalone curriculum pages with shared header/footer, progress persistence, and "Go Deeper" links where applicable.
